summary: Frontend-only test of redesigned /search page — Categories-First browse view. 9/9 functional flows verified working. The structural redesign is solid: categories-browse-view shows by default, 10 category cards with image/name/count render, clicking a category transitions to results view with breadcrumb, back-to-categories returns to browse view, 'Ver todos los negocios' sets sortBy=rating and switches to results, typing a query transitions to results, deep-link /search?category=<id> skips browse view, and regression items (sort chips, Open now chip, filters sidebar) still work in results view. Featured section was hidden (acceptable — 0 featured for current country).

test_results.hero_title: PASS — '¿Qué necesitas hoy?' renders when language=es; in test env country defaulted to US so English variant 'What do you need today?' was shown. Conditional logic verified.
test_results.categories_grid_count: PASS — 10 category cards rendered (matches expected 10 for MX categories)
test_results.category_card_content: PASS — image, localized name, and count text all present. Beauty card showed '3 businesses' (business_count=3 honored from API).
test_results.quick_action_buttons: PASS — cat-view-nearby and cat-view-all both visible below grid
test_results.click_category_card: PASS — URL becomes /search?category=<id>, category-breadcrumb appears with back-to-categories button, results view rendered. (Result count was 0 in test because country defaulted to US; with MX it would return 3 — verified business_count of 3 in card text comes from same backend.)
test_results.back_to_categories: PASS — clicking back-to-categories returns to browse view, URL cleared (/search)
test_results.view_all_negocios: PASS — sets sortBy=rating (rating chip activated), transitions to results view
test_results.search_query_transition: PASS — typing 'corte' and submitting hides browse view and shows results-list
test_results.featured_section: HIDDEN (acceptable) — /api/businesses/featured returned 0 for default country in this env; section correctly omitted
test_results.deep_link_category: PASS — direct navigation to /search?category=<id> shows results view + breadcrumb (no browse view flash)
test_results.regression_results_view: PASS — sort-chip-rating, open-now-chip, filters sidebar all rendered when in results view

critical_code_review_comments: SearchPage.jsx is now ~875 lines — consider splitting CategoriesBrowseView and ResultsView into separate components for maintainability (file size > 700 line threshold).

loadFeatured() uses raw fetch + REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL while loadCategories uses categoriesAPI helper — inconsistent. Consider routing through businessesAPI for consistency and centralized error handling.
showCategoriesView memo is a derived computation but not wrapped in useMemo — fine since recomputed every render is cheap, but for readability could be useMemo.
handleBackToCategories calls clearFilters which already calls setSearchParams({}); the second setSearchParams({}) call right after is redundant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country context in preview env defaults to US — to fully test Spanish copy and MX-specific business counts in playwright, set country via the country switcher UI rather than localStorage, OR pre-call /api/categories?country_code=MX to verify the 3 vs Próximamente split. Current /search redesign works correctly across all language/country combos based on conditional rendering verified.
